classes.reasoning: Document explicitly titled 'Clinical Study Protocol' with comprehensive protocol sections including title, synopsis, background, objectives, eligibility criteria, investigational product, and statistical analysis plan. Contains full protocol structure with version 1.0 dated 14 March 2023.

trial_title: A Phase II, Open-Label, Multicenter Study to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of BRC-471 (Lumitanib) in Patients with EGFR-Mutant Advanced Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer Following Progression on First-Line Osimertinib
indication: EGFR-Mutant Advanced Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer Following Progression on First-Line Osimertinib
summary: This is the original version of a Phase II clinical study protocol evaluating BRC-471 (Lumitanib), an oral EGFR/HER2 dual inhibitor, in patients with EGFR-mutant advanced non-small cell lung cancer who have progressed on first-line osimertinib. The protocol is an open-label, single-arm, multicenter study planned across Spain, France, Germany, and Italy with a target enrollment of 120 patients and a Simon two-stage design to evaluate objective response rate as the primary endpoint.
